allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "ContentLength: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "Telegram Hunter|Discovered Bots|Chat History|error" | Select-Object -First 10)
